Improving Konqueror with WebKit support (This is better than KHTML and passed 100% acidtest3. KHTML not)

Browser section

Improving Konqueror with WebKit support (This is better than KHTML and passed 100% acidtest3. KHTML not)

# cd /usr/ports/www/kwebkitpart
# make install clean

Open Konqueror > Settings> Configure Koqnueror...
Change KHTML by Webkit
